name: Complex Refactor
description: Large multi-phase refactoring with architecture, quality, and git considerations
task: We need to refactor our codebase to improve quality and align with better architectural patterns. Plan the phases, manage the git workflow, and maintain code quality throughout.

coding_challenge.description: Write a code migration tool that transforms old patterns to new ones. Accept legacy code patterns and return modernized versions. Handle nested structures and preserve logic.
